description: Data describing the core losses and the intermediate inputs used to calculate them
title: coreLossesOutput

methodUsed.description: Model used to calculate the core losses in the case of simulation, or method used to measure it

magneticFluxDensity.description: Excitation of the B field that produced the core losses
magneticFluxDensity.title: excitation

temperature.description: temperature in the core that produced the core losses

volumetricLosses.description: Volumetric value of the core losses. Unit: W/m^3.

massLosses.description: Mass-specific value of the core losses. Unit: W/kg.

eddyCurrentCoreLosses.description: Part of the core losses due to eddy currents. Unit: W.

hysteresisCoreLosses.description: Part of the core losses due to hysteresis. Unit: W.
